title: PES Spectrum Interactive Visualizer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive MicroSim for comparing PES spectra across elements and linking peaks to electron configurations.

learningObjectives: Analyze PES spectra to identify subshell peaks
Evaluate the effect of nuclear charge on binding energy

keyQuestions: Which subshell corresponds to the tallest peak?
How does increasing nuclear charge affect peak position?
commonMisconceptions: All peaks represent individual electrons instead of subshells
Binding energy decreases with atomic number
assessmentOpportunities: Ask learners to match a PES plot with the correct electron configuration
